title: Heavy Weapons Guy - Babyman (pokerface)
description:
MP3: http://www.sisucommunity.com/mp3/vinc_babyman.mp3 
Heavy sings his own version of Lady Gagas Pokerface. Also featuring Medic and Spy
I did not make the music, but I made the lyrics and edited the sounds. 
Orginal song is by Lady Gaga.

Disclaimer: The copyright of the song is the property of Lady Gaga. The material is from Team Fortress 2, a game which is the copyright of Valve Corporation. I do not profit from this video in any way, and I only take credit for my own creativity.

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Eyo4_42tU9Q&feature=watch_response Best video response ever!
